privacy-s1-p1: We value the trust you place in us. This Privacy Policy describes how Elecmoon ("we", "our", "us") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website elecmoon.com, mobile site, or related services (the "Platform").
privacy-s1-p2: By visiting the Platform, registering an account, placing an order, or submitting an enquiry, you agree to this Privacy Policy and our Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the Platform.
privacy-s2-p1: When you use our Platform, we collect information you provide such as your name, email address, phone number, billing and shipping address, order details, account login details, and messages submitted through contact or enquiry forms.
privacy-s2-p2: We may also collect technical information such as browser type, device information, IP address, and pages visited to improve site performance and security. Required fields are marked at the time of collection; optional fields may be left blank.
privacy-s3-p1: We use your information to process and deliver orders, manage your account, respond to enquiries, send order updates, improve our products and services, prevent fraud, and comply with legal obligations. With your consent, we may send promotional communications which you can opt out of at any time.
privacy-s4-p1: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember preferences, keep you signed in, and analyse site traffic. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may not work properly. Third-party payment and analytics providers may also place cookies subject to their own policies.
privacy-s5-p1: We may share information with trusted service providers for payment processing, shipping, email delivery, and website hosting. These partners receive only the data needed to perform their services. We do not sell your personal information. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights and users.
privacy-s6-p1: We use reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure. Please keep your account password confidential and notify us if you suspect unauthorised access.
privacy-s7-p1: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information by contacting info@Elecmoon.com.au. We will respond within a reasonable time as required by applicable law.
privacy-s8-p1: Our Platform is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us information, please contact us so we can remove it.
privacy-s9-p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the Platform after changes means you accept the revised policy.
terms-s1-p1: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of the Elecmoon website and services. By accessing or using elecmoon.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms-s1-p2: If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not use the Platform. We may update these Terms at any time by posting a revised version on this page.
terms-s2-p1: All product prices are displayed in AUD unless stated otherwise. We reserve the right to modify prices, refuse orders, or cancel orders in case of pricing errors, stock unavailability, or suspected fraud. Payment must be completed before an order is dispatched.
terms-s3-p1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information when registering or placing orders.
terms-s4-p1: You agree not to misuse the Platform, attempt unauthorised access, interfere with site operation, copy content without permission, or use the Platform for any unlawful purpose. All content on the Platform is owned by Elecmoon or its licensors.
terms-s5-p1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Elecmoon shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Platform or products purchased through it.
terms-s6-p1: Your use of the Platform is also subject to our
terms-s7-p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of Australia. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Victoria, Australia.
shipping-s1-p1: This Shipping Policy explains how Elecmoon processes, dispatches, and delivers orders placed through our Platform within Australia.
shipping-s2-p1: Orders are typically processed within 1–2 business days after payment confirmation. Processing may take longer during peak periods, public holidays, or for bulk or custom orders. You will receive email confirmation when your order is placed and when it is shipped.
shipping-s3-p1: Standard delivery to metro areas usually takes 3–7 business days after dispatch. Regional and remote areas may take 5–12 business days.
shipping-s3-p2: Large, heavy, or freight items may require separate delivery scheduling. Estimated delivery times are indicative only and may vary due to carrier or location factors.
shipping-s4-p1: Shipping fees are calculated at checkout based on product weight, dimensions, and delivery address. Any applicable charges are shown before you complete payment.
shipping-s5-p1: Where available, a tracking number will be sent to your registered email once the order is dispatched. Tracking may take up to 24 hours to become active on the carrier website.
shipping-s6-p1: If your order arrives damaged, incomplete, or with visible transit damage, please contact info@Elecmoon.com.au within 48 hours of delivery with your order number and photos. We will review the case under our Return and Refund Policy.
return-s1-p1: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy explains when returns and refunds are available for products bought from Elecmoon.
return-s2-p1: You may request a return within 14 days of delivery if:
return-s2-l1: The product is unused and in original condition
return-s2-l2: All original packaging, accessories, and documentation are included
return-s2-l3: You provide your order number or proof of purchase
return-s3-p1: Contact info@Elecmoon.com.au with your order number and reason for return. Do not ship the item until return approval and instructions are provided by our team.
return-s4-p1: Once we receive and inspect the returned item, approved refunds are processed within 5–10 business days to the original payment method. Bank processing times may vary.
return-s5-p1: Returns may not be accepted for used, installed, customised, or clearance items unless the product is faulty or was incorrectly supplied.
return-s6-p1: If you receive a defective or incorrect item, contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos and your order number. We will arrange a replacement, repair, or refund as appropriate.
